name: io.github.jyswee/agenticmemory
description: Persistent memory for AI agents — history, context, semantic search, queues. 17 tools, stdio/SSE.

environmentVariables.name: AGMRY_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Agentic Memory API key (amk_...). Optional for tool discovery; required to call a tool. Get one instantly with `agmry signup my-project` — no browser, no card, live for 48h; $0 card-auth starts the free 7-day trial.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token using your Agentic Memory API key: 'Bearer amk_...'. Optional for tool discovery; required to call a tool. Get one instantly with `npx agmry signup my-project`.
